personal.name: DilZhan Yapa
personal.title: Software Engineer @ HashBaze Pvt Ltd
personal.bio: Full-Stack Developer specializing in building scalable solutions. Focused on DevOps practices and modern web technologies.

about.title: About me
paragraphs: I'm a Software Engineer who enjoys owning the full picture, from the interface a user touches to the pipeline that ships it. I care about writing code that works well and building systems that hold up under pressure.

I've worked across frontend, backend, and DevOps, and I find the most interesting problems live at the edges where those worlds overlap. Outside of work I write articles and make YouTube content, mostly because explaining things is how I really learn them.
about.highlightText: most interesting problems live at the edges

hero.description: Software Engineer who builds modern web applications and cloud-native systems, with a strong focus on DevOps practices and shipping things that scale.
